nodes.label: Automation for repetitive regression tests
nodes.label_negative: Manual testing for repetitive regression tests
nodes.grounding_span: For regression testing I'm all for automation

nodes.label: Manual testing for new enhancements
nodes.grounding_span: when it comes to new enhancements, I think it's more beneficial to test these manually

nodes.label: AI as job threat
nodes.label_negative: AI as tool that creates opportunities
nodes.grounding_span: helping write the code to take over my job and replace me

nodes.label: Human perspective in testing (customer experience)
nodes.label_negative: Purely automated testing without human judgment
nodes.grounding_span: experiencing it from a customer's point of view

nodes.label: AI for fraud detection
nodes.grounding_span: fraud detection...could be run completely by AI

nodes.label: Job security and career growth
nodes.grounding_span: I don't think it will ever reach 100% and there will always be a need for manual testers

nodes.label: Efficiency and speed in testing
nodes.grounding_span: it's quicker and easier to run these types of tests manually

nodes.label: Quality customer experience
nodes.grounding_span: it doesn't feel right, it does what it's supposed to, but it could be better

nodes.label: Positive appreciation for automation after initial fear
nodes.grounding_span: I found a new appreciation for it

nodes.label: Initial fear of automation replacing job
nodes.grounding_span: helping write the code to take over my job and replace me

nodes.label: Satisfaction with learning opportunities from automation
nodes.grounding_span: That gives me more satisfaction with the job rather than automation itself

nodes.label: Openness to AI for fraud detection
nodes.grounding_span: I would like to see it used more around fraud detection

nodes.label: Pragmatic task differentiation based on context
nodes.grounding_span: For regression testing I'm all for automation...when it comes to new enhancements, I think it's more beneficial to test these manually

nodes.label: Hands-off monitoring after initial setup
nodes.grounding_span: once it's running I'm totally hands off
